notes: Removed shared-state helpers for current-run.json and deleted the tracked file.
Updated supervisor CLI parsing so route, work, and validate require --run-id.
Updated docs and instructions to describe explicit run targeting instead of a repo-global active run.
Added repo-local action wrappers that also require --run-id and refuse to act on a missing run directory.
open_issues: Any local aliases or wrapper scripts outside the repo that assumed implicit run targeting will need manual updates.
